title: Output: explain a process at work
subtitle: Describe workflow steps.

items.es: Primero se revisa la información del cliente.
items.en: First the client information is reviewed.

items.es: Luego se prepara un documento con los puntos principales.
items.en: Then a document is prepared with the main points.

items.es: Si hay errores, se corrigen antes de enviarlo.
items.en: If there are errors, they are corrected before sending it.

items.es: Después se comparte con el equipo.
items.en: Afterward it is shared with the team.

items.es: Al final se decide el siguiente paso.
items.en: In the end the next step is decided.
